summary: Frontend-only testing of Dare Board dApp. All core UI features verified across desktop and mobile viewports.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All tested features pass. Contract not deployed (REACT_APP_CONTRACT_ADDRESS is empty) — contract-not-deployed message on Feed and Dare detail pages is EXPECTED. Wallet connect button triggers wallet selection modal (expected). Mobile hamburger menu present at 375px. Filter tabs highlight purple on selection. Create form submit button shows 'Post Dare & Lock 0 STRK'.
